framework.name: DMAIC as Agent Decision-Making Framework
framework.description: The DMAIC cycle (Define-Measure-Analyze-Improve-Control) maps directly to autonomous agent behavior loops: Define = goal setting, Measure = sensor data collection, Analyze = pattern detection/root cause analysis, Improve = action execution, Control = monitoring and feedback. Manufacturing experts already think in these loops — they just need to formalize them for machines.
framework.raw_quote: N/A - derived from DMAIC structure analysis
